join_order.notes: Precompute suppkey->nationkey and nationkey->nation_code arrays once; use direct lookups in the lineitem loop.
Use existing partsupp composite PK hash index for point lookup; avoid lineitem postings expansion and random lineitem row access.

join_order.build: orders year dense lookup by o_orderkey
join_order.notes: Use column_versions/orders.o_orderdate.year_dense_by_orderkey/codes.bin for o_year lookup during aggregation.

optimization_notes: Root cause is a cache-exceeding random-access pattern in main_scan: probing lineitem_partsupp_hash from filtered partsupp rows drives scattered lineitem row fetches across large columns, causing latency-bound misses and poor locality. Category B (algorithm change) with plan restructuring: switch to a lineitem-driven sequential scan, apply green-part filtering via dense has_green lookup, do point lookups into existing partsupp_pk_hash for supplycost, and keep dense o_orderkey->year plus direct-array nation/year aggregation so the dominant work becomes bandwidth-friendly sequential scanning instead of random fact-row access.
